top_sources.top_context: ho Is a Good Candidate?** Good candidates share two features. 1. They have persistent symptoms despite well-run TRT. Think brain fog, word finding issues, poor stress tolerance, lighter sleep, or a new baseline of background anxiety. 2. Their labs support the story with low or low-normal pregnenolone and often low DHEA-S and modestly low male progesterone. **Older men and men with a history of head trauma often fit this pattern, as do some men who choose not to use hCG. **In these cases, a small trial in the 5-10mg range is reasonable while tracking sleep, mood, cognition, and daytime energy.
